items.title: Claude hit #2 on Apple's US App Store, hours after the DOD designated Anthropic a supply chain risk; it bounced between #20 and #50 for much of February (Jordan Novet/CNBC)
items.title_en: Claude hit #2 on Apple's US App Store, hours after the DOD designated Anthropic a supply chain risk; it bounced between #20 and #50 for much of February (Jordan Novet/CNBC)
items.title_zh: 在国防部指定 Anthropic 为供应链风险几个小时后，Claude 在苹果美国应用商店中排名第二； 2 月份的大部分时间里，它在第 20 名和第 50 名之间波动（Jordan Novet/CNBC）
